name: YES First Preferred Credit Card

domestic: 2 complimentary domestic lounge visits per calendar quarter
Access is subject to a spend threshold of Rs 75,000 in the previous calendar quarter.
international: Priority Pass or LoungeKey membership for the primary cardmember
4 complimentary international lounge visits per calendar year

joiningBenefits: First-year membership fee waived on spending Rs 50,000 within 90 days of card issuance
10,000 bonus YES Rewardz points on first transaction within 90 days of card issuance (worth Rs 2,500)

milestones.label: 20,000 bonus YES Rewardz points on annual spends of Rs 7.5 Lakhs

additionalBenefits: 25% discount on movie tickets on BookMyShow, up to Rs 250 per month
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per month
Green fee waiver and complimentary golf lessons at select golf courses
additionalDetails: 1% fee + GST on utility transactions when cumulative spends exceed Rs 15,000 in a calendar month
1% fee + GST on wallet load transactions when cumulative spends exceed Rs 15,000 in a calendar month

salaried: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-13.
Utility, rental, and wallet transactions are eligible to earn rewards at 4 points per Rs 200 spent (except utilities which earn 4 points per Rs 200).
1% fee on utility, rent, and wallet load transactions above thresholds.
Air miles transfer to Air India Maharaja Club at 10:1 ratio.
